scripts.lint:py: ./.venv/bin/ruff check src tests || ruff check src tests
scripts.format:py: ./.venv/bin/ruff format src tests || ruff format src tests
scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run typecheck:py
scripts.push:version: git add . && node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('git commit -m \"chore: bump version to ' + v + '\"', {stdio: 'inherit'})" && git push origin development
scripts.push:release: node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v' + v + ' --generate-notes', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.update:version: npm run lint && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/update-version.js && npm run push:version
scripts.deploy: git checkout main && git pull origin main && npm run lint && npm run test && git push origin main && node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('git tag -f v' + v + ' && git push origin -f v' + v, {stdio: 'inherit'})" && npm run push:release
